feature-griller.description: Question a feature idea before implementation.

planning.description: Turn a goal into a small, ordered implementation plan.

implementation-review.description: Implement, review, and verify a code slice.

sandbox-smoke.description: Tiny real converge smoke (creates smoke.txt in a sandbox).

feature-flow.description: Composed: grill -> plan -> approve gate -> implementation-review.

clarify.description: Model-less demo of an ask gate (asks one question, echoes the answer).

refine.description: Draft-and-critique loop until the critic says ship (a model-judged loop, no checks).
